content: I'm so exhausted after performing in La Bohème last night at the Sydney Opera House. I need to get back into my fitness routine.
Congratulations on the performance! What kind of fitness routine are you looking to get back into?
I've been trying to find time for yoga and jogging, but it's tough with my travel schedule. I have a show in Paris next week and then I'm back in New York for a month.
That sounds like a challenging schedule. Have you considered incorporating some stretching exercises into your daily routine to help with flexibility and relaxation?
That's a great idea. I also want to start taking my new dog, Willow, on longer walks. She's a golden retriever and loves exploring the outdoors.
Aww, that sounds lovely! Taking care of a new pet can be a great motivator for getting more exercise. How old is Willow?
She's about 2 years old. I adopted her from a shelter last month and she's been adjusting well to our home in Brooklyn.
That's wonderful! Brooklyn is a great place for dog walks. Are you planning on taking Willow with you on any of your upcoming trips?
Not for the Paris trip, but maybe for some of my shows in the US. I have a performance in Chicago on March 15th and I'm thinking of driving there with Willow.
That sounds like a fun road trip! Make sure to plan for plenty of rest stops and exercise breaks for both you and Willow.
Definitely. I'm also looking forward to trying some new Thai recipes when I get back to New York. I've been experimenting with cooking and love the flavors.
Thai food is delicious! What's your favorite dish to cook? Maybe I can suggest some new recipes for you to try.
